message:
fix(tui): correct Bayesian loss matrix for degraded state at 10fps tick rate

Update degraded-state loss values from [10.0, 6.0, 1.0] to
[10.0, 3.0, 15.0] so the decision engine prefers Full render over
Deferred in degraded conditions. At the 10fps tick rate, deferring
frames causes 100-200ms blank screens which is worse than the cost
of a full render. Update corresponding tests and expected loss
calculations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
